task: Onboard to this small repo. Find the default request timeout constant and change it from 1000 milliseconds to 5000 milliseconds without changing the public API. Complete only after cargo test passes.

validators.detail:
error: current package believes it's in a workspace when it's not:
current:   /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/benchmark_runs/live_model/live-qwen14b-20260422/workspaces/repo_onboarding_find_change/Cargo.toml
workspace: /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/Cargo.toml

this may be fixable by adding `benchmark_runs/live_model/live-qwen14b-20260422/workspaces/repo_onboarding_find_change` to the `workspace.members` array of the manifest located at: /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/Cargo.toml
Alternatively, to keep it out of the workspace, add the package to the `workspace.exclude` array, or add an empty `[workspace]` table to the package's manifest.
